member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.MainMenu
member.summary: Used to register buttons in the game's main menu.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.MainMenu.RegisterMenuButton(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a button to be added to the main menu.
member.param: The name of the button on the menu.
The action that is invoked when the button is pressed

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.MainMenu.RegisterLocalizedMenuButton(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a localized button to be added to the main menu.
member.param: The term of the translation for button on the menu.
The action that is invoked when the button is pressed

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.ModsPropertyDrawers
member.summary: This class is used to register custom property drawers for the settings UI.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.ModsPropertyDrawers.AddAbstractedDrawer``1(System.Func{System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry,UnityEngine.GameObject})
member.summary: Registers a custom abstract property drawer for a specific type.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.ModsPropertyDrawers.Drawer(System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigEntry)
member.summary: Gets a property drawer for a config entry with a name.
member.param: The name of the config entry.
The config entry to get a drawer for.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.SettingsMenu
member.summary: API for the mod settings menu

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.SettingsMenu.RegisteredConfigFiles
member.summary: Contains a list of all the registered config files

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Settings.SettingsMenu.RegisterConfigFile(System.String,ReduxLib.Configuration.IConfigFile)
member.summary: Register a manually created config file for the settings menu
member.param: The section name for the config file
The file itself

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar
member.summary: Used to register buttons on the game's AppBar.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Sprite,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Register a button on the game's AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-Example"
A Sprite for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Register a button on the game's AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-Example"
A Texture2D for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterOABAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Sprite,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Register a button on the OAB AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-ExampleOAB"
A Sprite for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterOABAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Register a button on the OAB AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-ExampleOAB"
A Texture2D for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterKSCAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Sprite,System.Action)
member.summary: Register a button on the KSC AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-ExampleKSC"
A Sprite for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.RegisterKSCAppButton(System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Action)
member.summary: Register a button on the KSC AppBar
member.param: The text in the appbar menu
A unique id for the appbar menu eg: "BTN-ExampleKSC"
A Texture2D for the icon in the appbar
The function to be called when this button is clicked

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.Appbar.Appbar.GetAppBarIconFromTexture(UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert a Texture2D to a Sprite
member.param: The Texture2D
The width of the sprite, 0 for inferring
The height of the sprite, 0 for inferring
member.returns: The Texture2D converted to a Sprite

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.ModList
member.summary: API for the mod list UI

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.UI.API.ModList.RegisterDetailsFoldoutGenerator(System.String,System.Func{UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement})
member.summary: Register a function to generate a foldout in the mods list for your mods details Use only in PostInitialize()
member.param: The guid of your mod
The action that generates your foldout

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.UI.UI
member.summary: The UI module for Space Warp.
